title: Slack Integration Setup
content:
Connect CloudDesk to Slack to receive real-time notifications in your channels.

**Setup Steps:**
1. Go to Settings → Integrations → Slack.
2. Click 'Connect to Slack'.
3. Authorize CloudDesk in the Slack OAuth dialog — select your workspace.
4. Choose a default notification channel (e.g., #clouddesk-alerts).
5. Configure which events trigger notifications: new tickets, status changes, mentions, SLA breaches.
6. Click Save.

**Posting Notifications:**
CloudDesk will post a formatted message to your chosen channel whenever a configured event occurs.

**Disconnecting:**
Settings → Integrations → Slack → Disconnect. This removes all webhooks. Your Slack messages are not deleted.

Note: You need Slack workspace admin permissions to authorize the integration.
